name: C2xGetTokenString
title: C2xGetTokenString
syntax: long C2xGetTokenString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, char buffer[] );
description: This function copies characters from the token and adds a terminating \0.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. geo_cnh

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. data

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Size of buffer in byte This function adds a terminating \0. Thus the maximum number of copied characters is bufferSize-1.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the data are copied

return: With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
Node Callback Function in CAPL Browser

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
